issues.title: Massive crater on Mattancherry main intersection
issues.description: A huge pothole has formed right at the Mattancherry intersection near the post office. It fills with water during rain, causing severe traffic jams and multiple two-wheeler skidding incidents.
issues.address: Mattancherry Post Office Junction, Kochi

issues.title: Broken streetlight near Girls High School
issues.description: The main street lamp near the girls high school entrance has been flickering and completely dark for the last 5 days. High safety concern for girls attending evening coaching classes.
issues.address: Bazar Road, near Girls High School, Mattancherry

issues.title: Uncontrolled garbage dumping on footpath
issues.description: Bags of solid household waste dumped right on the footpath. Stray dogs are scattering it across the road. Emitting extremely foul smell and blocking walking path.
issues.address: Pipeline Road near Edappally North Metro Station

issues.title: Major water pipeline burst
issues.description: Drinking water pipeline has broken. Thousands of gallons of clean water are leaking onto the main road, creating a waterlogging issue and reducing local tap water supply pressure.
issues.address: Peter Celli Street near Fort Kochi beach

issues.title: Dangerous pothole crater near main junction - Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 1
issues.description: A wide, deep pothole has opened up near the main traffic signal. It is hazardous to two-wheelers and gets filled with rainwater, making it completely invisible at night.
issues.address: Main Junction Junction Road, Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 1

issues.title: Burst water supply pipe causing water wastage - Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 2
issues.description: Drinking water main pipeline is leaking heavily. Clean drinking water is flooding the street, causing minor waterlogging and dropping tap pressure in nearby households.
issues.address: Behind Civil Station, Block B, Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 2

issues.title: Broken and dark streetlights - Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 2
issues.description: Three consecutive streetlights are out of order for more than two weeks, leaving the entire stretch pitch black. Very risky for pedestrians and safety at night.
issues.address: Near Govt School, Secondary Lane, Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 2

issues.title: Broken and dark streetlights - Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 3
issues.description: Three consecutive streetlights are out of order for more than two weeks, leaving the entire stretch pitch black. Very risky for pedestrians and safety at night.
issues.address: Near Govt School, Secondary Lane, Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 3

issues.title: Illegal garbage pile dumping on pathway - Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 4
issues.description: Large volumes of plastic waste and food waste dumped openly on the pedestrian pathway. Emitting foul odors and attracting stray animals and vectors.
issues.address: Market Road, beside Public Park, Kochi Municipal Corporation Ward 4

comments.text: I live right next to this junction, and three two-wheelers fell here last evening alone! This is extremely critical, please fix this immediately.
We have assigned our solid waste disposal trucks. Clean up is scheduled for today morning.

ward_score_history.reason: Multiple unresolved street and pothole reports
Successful resolution of Fort Kochi pipeline leakage within SLA

communities.name: Fort Kochi Residents Club
communities.description: A community for people living, working, and loving Fort Kochi Beach area. Let's keep our heritage clean!

communities.description: Focused on solving waste management, water logging, and broken lights around Lulu Mall and NH 66.
